title: Guard chart inputs with values.schema.json
description: Define a JSON Schema for values so bad or missing inputs fail at install time with a clear error instead of rendering broken manifests.
body: Use when a chart has required or constrained values that operators must supply. Do not rely on templates failing cryptically on a missing key. Actions: add a values.schema.json declaring required properties, types, enums, and ranges; Helm validates supplied values against it on install/upgrade/lint/template; combine with required in templates for values that must be set. Validation signals include helm lint/template rejecting an invalid value set with a precise schema error and accepting a valid one. Risk boundary: loosening schema constraints that protect production-critical inputs (replica counts, resource limits) should be reviewed.
